decision: Recommend only from the intersection of an approved task-profile catalog, current runtime discovery, exact artifact identity, and a platform-specific memory-fit verdict. Missing identity or memory evidence produces a typed unavailable state, never a guessed model.

evidence_classes.exact: Observed for the exact artifact digest, runtime build, platform adapter, context, parallelism, and workload phase.
evidence_classes.estimate: Conservative catalog calculation used only for cold screening.
evidence_classes.runtime-unexecuted: Required production behavior or measurement not exercised by this analysis.

hard_invariants: The approved unit is a versioned task profile, not a model family.
Native key, compat ID, artifact digest, format, and quantization must reconcile exactly.
A family name, parameter count, filename, or equal file size is not identity.
Unknown quantization cannot match a quantization-specific approval.
Context fit and memory fit are separate gates.
CUDA accelerator memory and host RAM are independently limited resources.
Apple unified memory is one shared pool; overlapping counters are not summed.
VRAM from multiple devices is never summed without approved placement evidence.
A cold estimate is never relabeled as an observed peak.
Manual selection does not bypass identity, capability, or hard memory failure.
No unapproved fallback model is selected silently.

algorithm.name: resolve_request_shape
algorithm.rule: Consume exact accepted token/context planning; do not estimate tokens from characters in the recommender.

algorithm.name: discover_runtime
algorithm.rule: Preserve per-plane status and identifiers; never infer one ID from another.

algorithm.name: reconcile_exact_identity
algorithm.rule: Digest mismatch is a hard identity mismatch. Hash-unavailable identities are not Auto-eligible.

algorithm.name: intersect_approved_catalog
algorithm.rule: Lab candidate or benchmark status is evidence only and cannot auto-promote a production profile.

algorithm.name: collect_hardware_snapshot
algorithm.rule: Use bytes internally and retain adapter/version, capture time, sample quality, totals, available values, and resource scope.

algorithm.name: cold_static_screen
algorithm.rule: Apply profile-owned static, KV, workspace, absolute headroom, and proportional headroom envelopes. File size alone is only a lower-bound input.

algorithm.name: evaluate_observed_peak
algorithm.rule: Reuse only an exact-shape observation binding identity, runtime, platform adapter, context, parallelism, concurrency, KV/cache, placement, workload phase, sample interval, and cleanup read-back.

algorithm.name: rank_eligible_profiles
order: exact observed fit over estimate-only fit

memory_equations.reserve_rule: Both the absolute and proportional reserve apply; the profile must pass the stricter result.
memory_equations.estimate_limit: Scaling formulas may reject an impossible profile but cannot promote an unobserved larger context or concurrency shape to exact fit.

platform_matrix.fit_rule: Accelerator and host budgets both pass independent reserves.
platform_matrix.fallback: Estimate-only only when the exact profile policy permits it.

platform_matrix.fit_rule: Never sum devices without approved placement evidence.
platform_matrix.fallback: Restrict to one proven placement or return unavailable.
Do not treat unused VRAM as general RAM.

observed_inputs: MLX runtime allocation/cache peak from verified adapter
platform_matrix.fit_rule: One shared-pool reserve; overlapping OS, process, and runtime counters are not summed.
platform_matrix.fallback: Use only an equivalent pre-approved observed envelope or return metrics unavailable/observation missing.

cuda.preferred: NVML with all visible devices and process attribution
cuda.known_current_limit: Existing LabKit sampling reads the first NVIDIA row and process RSS by process name; it is insufficient for multi-GPU, MIG, sharding, or robust process attribution.

apple_unified.blocker: Supported APIs, counter semantics, cache reset, process attribution, sampling overhead, and behavior under LM Studio have not been verified on supported macOS builds.

required: required task capability and semantic/product evidence

manual_mode.rule: Only exact discovered identities intersected with approved profiles are approved manual choices.
manual_mode.estimate_only: Allowed only by explicit product policy with a user-confirmed guarded load/canary and clear not-yet-observed status.
manual_mode.free_text_model_id: May remain an advanced diagnostic field but is outside approved selection.

confidence_policy.required: Exact identity and request shape, trusted platform adapter, retained peak, and cleanup read-back.
Exact identity, approved formulas, current hardware snapshot, and explicit profile permission.
Design/static contract only; no matching peak.
Identity, quantization, metrics, or formula missing.

fallback_order: Choose another approved profile for the same task with a smaller exact context/concurrency shape.
Offer an approved manual estimate-only profile with a clear warning if policy permits.
Keep the original application-owned source/output path and report local model unavailable.
Never select an unapproved model or mutate the task contract silently.

unresolved_gates.name: mlx_metal_metrics_adapter
unresolved_gates.missing: Verified APIs, field semantics, reset/scope, process attribution, sampling overhead, and supported-build behavior.

unresolved_gates.name: artifact_digest_resolution
unresolved_gates.missing: Privacy-safe immutable digest resolution for every installed model.

unresolved_gates.name: cuda_device_process_attribution
unresolved_gates.missing: Multi-GPU, MIG, sharding, and robust process/device attribution.

unresolved_gates.name: memory_envelope_calibration
unresolved_gates.missing: Exact loaded peaks for every approved task/context/concurrency/quantization shape.

unresolved_gates.name: kv_workspace_formulas
unresolved_gates.missing: Runtime-specific versioned formulas validated against observed peaks.

unresolved_gates.name: headroom_policy
unresolved_gates.missing: Absolute and proportional reserve thresholds backed by stress evidence.

unresolved_gates.name: host_lifecycle_integration
unresolved_gates.missing: End-to-end Auto selection, materialization, ownership, cancellation, cleanup, and fallback evidence.

unresolved_gates.name: production_approval_catalog
unresolved_gates.missing: Explicit product-owned approvals; current lab candidates must not be auto-promoted.

evidence_sources: read-only host application LM Studio discovery, settings, and lifecycle contracts
non_claims: No model is approved, ranked, or made a production default by this report.
No live hardware, LM Studio, CUDA, MLX, Metal, tokenizer, load, or inference operation was executed.
Model file size and reported load estimates are not exact resident or peak memory.
Available memory at recommendation time does not guarantee a later allocation.
Parameter count is not a task-quality ranking.
Maximum-GPU placement, physical KV reuse, multi-GPU aggregation, and Apple MLX metrics are not proven.
